channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Exposed cables on street light, 10th April
item.description:
The protection panels on this street light is removed and the electrical cables are exposed. This needs to be checked and made safe asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 139, Westminster Bridge Road, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction of Hylton and Brookedene rubbish bags ….,,, 10th April
item.description:
Rubbish bags containing food and spilling onto pavement on Brookedene by phone box. On Hylton street crossroads dumped household items one side and dumped black sacks the other side of road. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins being left outside after collection day, 10th April
item.description:
Bins being left outside after collection day 91 93 95 97 99 st johns park

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Johns Park, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lebanese takeaway doing a refurb and dumping waste in apartment complex bin area, 10th April
item.description:
There is a lebanese takeaway/kebab shop next to Tesco that is refurbishing their kitchen and is dumping the old metal goods, such a extractor hoods, in our communal bin area. They did this at 2:30am

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Regal Row, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Toy car and …………., 10th April
item.description:
Toy car and white structure dumped, been here a couple of days. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blithdale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement cracking and lifting, 10th April
item.description:
Previous pavement repair is cracking and lifting and represents a trip hazard to members of the public

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wellands Close, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 10th April
item.description:
There is a dead fox in the rear garden of 123 Victoria Way.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Way, Charlton

item.title: Dumped chair and door which I’ve left with ………, 10th April
item.description:
A bag of litter picked rubbish to be collected please. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blithdale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous walls about to collapse, 10th April
item.description:
Both of these walls have gradually increased how much they are leaning over, it's only a matter of time before they collapse onto the pavement. This road has a lot of pedestrians walking down it, including children so this is very dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Versailles Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sinkhole, 10th April
item.description:
This hole is growing daily. Needs urgent remediation. Please stop passing the buck between Thames water and yourselves. This is extremely dangerous for the general public. The longer is it left the more costly the repairs will be. Does someone need to fall down this before this is fixed? Does it need to completely collapse taking neighbouring properties with it? Come on Bromley council sort this out! It was reported almost a year ago and nothing has been done.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Weston Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 10th April
item.description:
Check box for address and remove. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Crawthew Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
